title: Skinny ahh pvp swords 32x
description: This texture pack adds skinny pvp swords to use for pvp, obviously.
body:
This texture pack adds skinny swords that dont block your screen when pvping. This allows for less of your screen being taken up by a sword while still keeping it good looking. You can use this texture pack over other packs.

If it says broken or imcompatible, it doesn't matter, it still works
